name: Life Drain
acquisitionSource: Clear Interlude - Verboten Covenant: Wall of Desert Sands

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: At the end of the turn, gain Keyflare equal to 200% of the wielder's Keyflare Regen. If the current Realm is {Caro}, the Effect changes to: for every 5 points of Keyflare Regen, {Embryo Fusion} +1.

lore: The cord binds child to mother, a conduit for the fetus to drain an infinite future.
